summary: Full-stack MeraBazaar MVP tested. Backend: 19/20 pytest tests pass (register 500 bug fixed during testing). Frontend: home, header (7 category links, lang toggle, pincode filter), product detail (WA/UPI/ribbons), seller login/dashboard, register→verify wizard (Aadhaar OKYC + FSSAI + GSTIN), create listing all pass end-to-end. One backend bug remains: brute-force 429 lockout does not trigger reliably because request.client.host reflects the k8s ingress pod IP (varies across 2 replicas) and login_attempts identifier is per-IP.

critical.issue: Brute-force 429 lockout NOT triggered — 7+ consecutive wrong-password attempts all returned 401. Root cause: `ident = f"{ip}:{email}"` uses request.client.host, which behind k8s ingress equals the upstream proxy pod IP and differs between replica pods (observed 10.208.128.6 and 10.208.128.2 in login_attempts collection). Also there are 2 backend replicas so counters are split per pod-IP. Fix: honor X-Forwarded-For (first hop) or use email-only identifier so brute-force is IP-agnostic.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 due to mongo _id (ObjectId) in returned user_doc after insert_one. FIXED during testing by popping _id.

CORSMiddleware has allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' from env — browsers reject wildcard+credentials. Preview works because ingress overrides CORS, but this will break in other envs. Recommend setting CORS_ORIGINS to explicit REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL origin.

issues: Trust ribbons render correctly with navy body + orange left-triangle notch matching spec.
Hero carousel, pincode filter, EN/HI toggle, category strip, orange search button all match spec.
Verify wizard success state text 'FSSAI VERIFIED' / 'GSTIN VERIFIED' is small green text — could be reinforced with a green check chip but not blocking.

action_items: Fix brute-force lockout: derive client IP from X-Forwarded-For header (or key attempts by email alone) so 6th failed login → 429 works behind k8s ingress with multiple backend replicas.
Tighten CORS_ORIGINS in backend/.env to the explicit REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL origin (do not ship allow_credentials=True with '*').
critical_code_review_comments: server.py register endpoint mutated insert doc and returned _id → 500 (fixed).

supabase_mirror() also mutates docs indirectly since insert_one adds _id; ok now because payload filter excludes password_hash, but future callers that pass raw docs may see ObjectId leaks — consider deep-copy before insert_one everywhere.
get_current_user reads httpOnly cookie OR Bearer — good. Cookies are set with samesite='none' + secure=True — correct for cross-site preview URL.
seed_users idempotency correctly updates password_hash if the env password rotates.
Login rate-limit identifier scoping is buggy behind proxy (see HIGH).
No pagination on /api/listings and no auth on /api/listings — acceptable for MVP but note for later.
test_credentials: admin@bazaarly.in / Admin@1234 ; seller@bazaarly.in / Seller@1234 ; Aadhaar OTP 123456 (MOCK)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* users and listings created via API/UI tests; safe to leave (seeded seller listings intact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 2 replicas — any per-request state keyed by request.client.host will be inconsistent. Register 500 bug already fixed. UI is Amazon-style and matches palette. Verify ribbons at [data-testid=mb-ribbon-identity] / [data-testid=mb-ribbon-gov] are styled correctly with orange notch.
rca of the issue: Brute-force 429 miss: k8s ingress terminates client TCP; FastAPI's request.client.host resolves to the ingress proxy pod IP which round-robins across replicas, so per-(ip,email) counter never reaches 5 on a single pod. Reproduction: run 7 consecutive POST /api/auth/login with same wrong password — observe all 401 and login_attempts collection shows multiple identifier rows differing only by ip prefix. Mitigation: read X-Forwarded-For[0] or drop ip from identifier.
